content.thinking:
Let me analyze the three grids:

Target grid:
- Row 1: X X X X X (all filled)
- Row 2: в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў (all empty)
- Row 3: в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў (all empty)
- Row 4: X X X X X (all filled)
- Row 5: в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў (all empty)

So the target has two horizontal stripes of filled cells (rows 1 and 4), with empty rows in between and at the bottom.

Distractor 1:
- All rows have the same pattern: в–Ў в–Ў в–Ў X X
- The last two columns are filled throughout

Distractor 2:
- All rows have the same pattern: в–Ў в–Ў X X X
- The last three columns are filled throughout

Key distinguishing features of the target:
1. It has horizontal stripes (rows completely filled)
2. Two rows are completely filled (rows 1 and 4)
3. The filled rows are at the top and in the middle (with a gap)
4. The distractors have vertical patterns (columns filled), while target has horizontal patterns
5. Target has alternating pattern of filled and empty rows

Best description: "Two horizontal stripes at the top and middle rows" or "Rows 1 and 4 completely filled" or "Two complete horizontal lines of filled cells"

content.text: Expression: Two horizontal stripes of filled cells, one at the top row and one at the fourth row, with all other rows empty.

clem_player.response: Expression: Two horizontal stripes of filled cells, one at the top row and one at the fourth row, with all other rows empty.
